name: salt-ds-v1.45
description: Salt Design System v1.45.0 — DataGrid virtualization + column pinning; Dialog focus-trap fix for nested Drawer; new density-touch token; ComboBox controlled-open. Also defines the package-level interface and the current_version bitemporal history so time-travel queries return the right version label.

side_packages.name: @salt-ds/theme
side_packages.summary: Design tokens (colour, density, corner-radius, typography) as CSS variables.

side_packages.name: @salt-ds/icons
side_packages.summary: Salt icon set — tree-shakeable React components.

side_packages.name: @salt-ds/lab
side_packages.summary: Pre-stable components incubating before promotion to @salt-ds/core.

provider.name: SaltProvider
provider.summary: Wrap your app to apply tokens and density. Nested providers override.

facts.title: v1.45.0 release notes
facts.body: v1.45.0 — DataGrid gains column pinning + virtualised row rendering for ≥ 100k-row datasets; Dialog focus-trap fix for nested Drawer composition; new density token `density-touch` for tablet form-factor; ComboBox now exposes a controlled `open` prop. No breaking changes vs 1.44.x.
